programs.title: The Comeback
programs.desc: A television actress tries desperately to revive her career.

programs.title: John Wick
programs.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programs.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programs.desc: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

programs.title: Half Man
programs.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programs.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programs.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programs.title: Euphoria
programs.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.
